name: Discord
description: Talk to this agent from Discord — slash-command interactions with signature verification, threaded replies, and typing indicators via eve's discordChannel.

secrets.name: DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID
secrets.description: Discord application id — used to edit and follow up on interaction responses.

secrets.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: Bot token for channel messages and typing indicators.

secrets.name: DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY
secrets.description: Ed25519 public key for inbound interaction verification.
